_comment: Fallback content for the Home page, read via nt_data('home'). Admin-saved options and DB data override these values in the template.

hero.title: Build your next site on a registry-driven theme
hero.subtitle: Pages, AJAX, REST, redirects and admin screens are all plain arrays. Add an entry, add a file - done.

features.title: Array Routing
features.text: One entry in config/pages.php maps URL, template, CSS and JS together.

features.title: Instant AJAX
features.text: Register an action in config/ajax.php and call NT.ajax() - nonce handled for you.

features.title: Safe by Default
features.text: Nonce, capability and realpath checks live in the engines, not in each handler.
